caption: An expansive parking lot dominates the foreground of the image, which appears to be taken from a slightly elevated vantage point. The parking lot is mostly empty, with a few cars parked within it.  In the background, a reddish-brown brick building is visible. This building features a series of windows and has a smaller, possibly utility-style structure near its center. To the right of the building, a line of trees stands, adding a touch of greenery to the scene. Beyond the trees, a road with a yellow dividing line can be seen. A small, white building is located near the left edge of the parking lot, close to the road. There are also several light posts throughout the parking lot area.
